creator: web@umich.edu
text:
Using this command "pkg version -vIL=" while in /usr/ports as root I get this:

drm-61-kmod-6.1.92.1402500_3  <   needs updating (index has  6.1.92.1402501_3)

This is after a fresh "git pull" and "make fetchindex".  In fact the string
6.1.92.1402501_3 appears in the INDEX-14 (I am running 14.2-STABLE OSversion
1402500).

Yet when I run portmaster to rebuild or update the graphics/drm-61-kmod port
I continually get a reinstallation of drm-61-kmod-6.1.92.1402500_3 I do not get
drm-61-kmod-6.1.92.1402501_3.

I don't know what to do.  I have done "pkg delete" on this port and within the
graphics/drm-61-kmod directory "make deinstall" and "make reinstall". also I
have done "make clean" followed by "make install clean" but in none of these
cases can I update the port to 6.1.92.1402501_3 (this is also true for the
graphics/gpu-firmware-kmod meta port -- several dozen of the resulting ports
do not upgrade to their 1402501_3 counterparts:

gpu-firmware-amd-kmod-renoir-20230625.1402500_2 <   needs updating (index has 20230625.1402501_2)

Please advise how I can correct this.  Thank you in advance.
